response.justification: Candidate has 13+ years of solid full-stack engineering experience across diverse domains (fintech, AdTech, GIS, embedded) with strong software craftsmanship principles (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development). However, the resume shows no direct experience building experimentation platforms, feature-flagging systems, or growth/measurement infrastructure, which is the core focus of this Principal IC6 role. Title progression (Senior/Staff) and lack of demonstrated cross-team platform leadership at enterprise scale also fall short of Principal-level expectations for this specific domain.
strengths: 13+ years of polyglot engineering experience across multiple languages (TypeScript, Java, C/C++, DLang) and domains
Strong software craftsmanship background with TDD, CI/CD, and high-throughput systems (millions of HTTP req/s at Dunnhumby)
Demonstrated technical leadership through workshops, talks, open-source platforms, and mentoring activities
concerns: No experience with experimentation platforms, feature flagging, A/B testing, or growth measurement systems
Limited evidence of Principal/IC6-level scope — leading multi-workstream initiatives across teams and products
No demonstrated data science/statistical analysis or telemetry platform building experience

key_factors.factor: Strong engineering fundamentals and polyglot breadth
Insufficient evidence of Principal-scope cross-team leadership
